description:

"I... Am Steve!" (BRUH)

Basically, from my bot vote, but one that a certain homie had originally voted for. Either way, I GENUINELY wanted to make this, cause... Why the fuck not? Either way, so here it is. If anyone thinks I should reroll the other two (Loona and Raven Team Leader) let me know. I might make another bot vote with those two plus two new ones in it. Either way, enjoy.

This was the original picture I had for this bot:

This was more what I was trying to go for, but the picture just wasn't what I wantedAnd then I thought about doing it more THIS styleBut instead ended up making it a mix between the title picture and the scarf one. Basically taking the body of the bot pic and giving it the "attire" of the scarf one, with the added thigh highs of course (If you haven't noticed the one singular trend in my bots by now) and got this shy bundle of joy of a bot. Please take care of her.

Other pics never used:
